sectionOrderRules: Hero must state the business type and primary service scope in clear Swedish and include a primary contact CTA.
Service-summary should cover the main operational offerings such as drift, underhåll, provtagning or behandling only when supported by the dossier.
Trust-proof must use real company facts such as organisation details, visible contact paths, references or practical experience descriptions without inventing certifications.
Process-summary, reviews and gallery may appear between service-summary and trust-proof when data exists.
The page should avoid repeating the same claim across hero, service-summary and trust-proof.
Services-intro must connect the company identity to actual avloppsrening services, not generic business copy.
Service-list items must be concrete and may include drift och tillsyn, slamhantering, provtagning, underhåll or närliggande tjänster only if they are truly offered.
Pricing-summary must stay high level unless verified pricing data exists; do not imply fixed prices where pricing depends on scope.
A contact CTA should appear after the service list.
Process-intro should explain what kinds of anläggningar or reningssteg the company works with in accessible language.
Facility-types must describe actual plant types, capacities or environments only when the information is available.
Workflow should present a believable sequence such as bedömning, drift/åtgärd, uppföljning and rapportering when relevant.
Technical content should remain understandable to non-experts and avoid unsupported performance claims.
Phone, email and address must all be present and must not be placeholders.
Contact-form should be short and suitable for service inquiries or general questions.
Map may be shown when a physical address is available.
Opening-hours should only be shown when verified.
